stemHtml: Ground Based Augmentation System (GBAS) provides data which defines the Final Approach Segment (FAS). The data is transmitted on…

options.a: VHF to arriving aircraft to correct any anomalies in the localiser aspect of the approach.
options.b: UHF providing error corrections for the glide slope.
options.c: UHF to arriving aircraft, together with differential position corrections and integrity information for each satellite in view.
options.d: VHF to arriving aircraft, together with differential position corrections and integrity information for each satellite.
